← Mosaiq

Mosaiq Detection Lab Leaderboard

Generated 2026-06-09T14:10:01.603Z · SDK 0.10.0 · 4 persona(s) · 1 engine(s)

Each row is a real mosaiq detection-lab run against the committed fixture persona, scored across a battery of public fingerprint / bot-detection sites. Lower weightedHits is better (fewer detector hits = stronger anti-detection). Numbers are reproducible from this repo’s baseline runs; no figures are hand-edited. Competitor engines are only listed when we have a real measured run — we never estimate or fabricate their scores.

Reproduce locally: pnpm mosaiq detection-lab run <persona-id>, then regenerate this page with pnpm build-leaderboard.
